allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(''store/bm25_encoder.json''\)\); print\(''keys:'', list\(d.keys\(\)\)[:5]\); vocab = d.get\(''params'', {}\).get\(''doc_freq'', {}\); print\(''vocab_size:'', len\(vocab\) if isinstance\(vocab, dict\) else ''N/A''\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(''store/bm25_encoder.json''\)\); print\(''n_docs:'', d.get\(''n_docs''\)\); print\(''avgdl:'', d.get\(''avgdl''\)\); print\(''b:'', d.get\(''b''\)\); print\(''k1:'', d.get\(''k1''\)\); print\(''doc_freq len:'', len\(d.get\(''doc_freq'', {}\)\)\); print\(''first 3 doc_freq keys:'', list\(d.get\(''doc_freq'', {}\).keys\(\)\)[:3]\)")
